title: Partial Differential Equations and Continuum Models
description: Build, test, and communicate a model involving diffusion, waves, and transport. Learners cumulatively produce a reproducible partial differential equations computational study through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Formulate pde classification in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive boundary initial conditions in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute separation variables in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
